nominations_position_nominee_email_uniqu.name: nominations_position_nominee_email_unique
nominations_position_nominee_email_uniqu.where: "nominations"."nominee_id" IS NULL AND "nominations"."nominee_email" IS NOT NULL

nominations_nominee_identity_check.name: nominations_nominee_identity_check
nominations_nominee_identity_check.value: "nominations"."nominee_id" IS NOT NULL OR ("nominations"."nominee_name" IS NOT NULL AND ("nominations"."nominee_email" IS NOT NULL OR "nominations"."nominee_phone" IS NOT NULL))
